name: Jobber Field Service API
what_it_does: Jobber GraphQL API for field service management platform targeting small-to-medium home service businesses. Enables AI agents to manage jobs, quotes, invoices, clients, schedules, and payments; automate client communication; and integrate Jobber operations into business workflows. Jobber serves landscaping, cleaning, plumbing, HVAC, and other home service industries.
use_cases: Managing service quotes and job scheduling from field service automation agents
Processing invoices and payments from billing automation agents
Syncing client and job data with CRM and marketing tools from integration agents
Automating client communication and follow-ups from customer success agents
not_for: Enterprise field service without SMB pricing requirements
Complex multi-branch operations requiring enterprise scheduling
Non-home-service industries without field service workflows
best_when: A small-to-medium home service business wants AI agents to automate quoting, scheduling, invoicing, and client communication within the Jobber platform.
avoid_when: PRIVACY: Client home addresses and service history collected. GraphQL introspection may expose schema details — disable in production.

auth.notes: Jobber uses OAuth 2.0 with authorization code flow for app integration. Scopes control access to specific resources. App marketplace integration available for published apps. Account-scoped tokens per installation.

pricing.free_tier_limits: 14-day free trial; no permanent free tier
pricing.paid_tiers: Core, Connect, Grow plans per-user per-month; API access on Connect and above
pricing.notes: Canadian company (Edmonton). SMB-focused field service pricing. App Marketplace allows partner integrations. API access requires Connect plan or above.

performance.rate_limits: GraphQL complexity limits; rate limits per OAuth app

known_agent_gotchas: PRIVACY: Client home addresses and service history
GraphQL only — no REST API; requires GraphQL query knowledge
No public MCP server — GraphQL API with OAuth2
GraphQL complexity limits may require query optimization for large data sets
Per-installation OAuth tokens — each Jobber account is a separate OAuth installation
agent_readiness.security_notes: Client residential data. SOC2, GDPR. OAuth2 with scopes. GraphQL-only API. Canadian company — CA/US data residency.

security_score_components.security_notes: Client residential data. SOC2, GDPR. OAuth2. GraphQL-only. Canadian company.
